## IProcedureSelectorProps.onAddProcedure property

Callback when user wants to add a new procedure option. If not provided, the "Add procedure option" button is hidden. The callback should open a picker and call actions.addOption() with the selected option.

**Signature:**

```typescript
onAddProcedure?: () => void;
```
